title: Fix finding typedef accessed via type parameter pointing to type parameter

features.name: class with type parameter containing typedef
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter that contains a typedef struct packed accessed via scope resolution

features.name: interface with type parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface with a type parameter used as a signal type

features.name: interface with type parameter pointing to parameterized class
features.description: Code should include an interface with a type parameter that defaults to a parameterized class
features.snippet:
interface outer #(parameter type X = C#(logic));
endinterface

features.name: scoped typedef access via interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include a scoped typedef access (X::td_t) where X is an interface type parameter pointing to a class containing the typedef

features.name: interface instantiation with scoped typedef as type argument
features.description: Code should include an interface cell instantiation where a typedef from a class is passed as a type argument via scope resolution through an interface type parameter
